best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-system-002 title: verify local user access to data organizer module: system source pages: 1 preconditions: the system is running, and the local user component is active. test data: no specific test data required. test steps: 1. the local user attempts to access the data organizer. 2. the data organizer responds with the requested data. expected result: the local user receives the correct data from the data organizer.

test case id: tc-system-013 title: verify product removal from fridge module: fridge source pages: 3 preconditions: the system is running, and a fridge contains a product. test data: a fridge with id=1, containing a product. test steps: 1. the schema principale triggers changefragment(0). 2. changefragment(0) calls rigofrito to remove the product. 3. rigofrito removes the product. 4. rigofrito updates the firebase database with the removal. expected result: the product is successfully removed from the fridge and the firebase database is updated accordingly.
